Typedefs | Functions
controls.h File Reference

Typed list of control descriptors. More...

#include <stddef.h>
#include <stdint.h>
#include "control.h"
#include "list.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t controls_t
 List of control_t descriptors.
 

Functions

static controls_t * controls_new (size_t size)
 Allocate a new controls list.
 
static void controls_free (controls_t *controls, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a controls list and optionally each control.
 
static bool controls_add (controls_t *controls, control_t *control)
 Append a control to the list.
 
static control_t * controls_get (const controls_t *controls, size_t index)
 Retrieve a control by index.
 
static size_t controls_size (const controls_t *controls)
 Return the current number of controls.
 
static size_t controls_capacity (const controls_t *controls)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool controls_empty (const controls_t *controls)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 
static control_t * controls_find (const controls_t *controls, const char *name)
 Find a control by name.
 
static void controls_iterate (const controls_t *controls, void(*callback)(control_t *))
 Iterate over all controls and invoke a callback for each.
 
static void controls_inspect (const controls_t *controls, int(*print_func)(const char *,...))
 Print a human-readable dump of the controls list.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides controls_t (a list_t specialization) together with creation, access, lookup and inspection helpers.

[in]controlPointer to the control to copy in.
Returns
true on success.

static control_t * controls_find ( const controls_t * controls,
const char * name )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]controlsPointer to the list.
[in]nameNull-terminated name to search for.
Returns
Pointer to the matching control, or NULL if not found.

void(* free_func )(void *) )

Parameters
[in]controlsPointer to the list.
[in]free_funcPer-item destructor (may be NULL).

size_t index )

Parameters

Returns
Pointer to the control, or NULL if out of range.

int(* print_func )(const char *,...) )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]controlsPointer to the list.
[in]print_funcPrintf-like callback used for output.

void(* callback )(control_t *) )
inlinestatic
Parameters

[in]callbackFunction called for each control_t pointer.
